source_script: Paste the original story idea, narration draft, scene script, or creative brief here.
global_constraints: The final video is generated from text prompts and intermediate images.
The code must not call WeDaVinci directly; WeDaVinci upload is manual.
Prompts must preserve scene order and visual continuity.
Do not invent assets, scenes, dialogue, or generation steps that are not present in the input config.

iteration_history.reason: Create a first structured prompt plan from the input script.

shots.title: Opening Scene
shots.notes: Describe visible scene content, motion, continuity requirements, or editing notes.
